hero.title: Maksim Kulgin
hero.subtitle: Systems. Data. Defense.
hero.description: Over 30 years in IT — from network engineering and e-commerce to a portfolio of bootstrapped SaaS products. Author of three engineering books on network infrastructure. Building real technology products without hype.

items.title: Data & Parsing
items.desc: Web scraping, price monitoring, data feeds — built at scale for real B2B clients.

items.title: Traffic Defense
items.desc: Click fraud protection and anti-bot systems that protect advertising budgets.

items.title: Internet Systems
items.desc: Infrastructure thinking applied to modern products — from IP/IPX to distributed data pipelines.

items.title: Bootstrapped Growth
items.desc: From 0 to 40M+ revenue per year without venture capital. Real numbers, real mistakes.

posts.title: 20M Rubles a Year on Web Scraping
posts.excerpt: How an engineering team turned a parsing infrastructure into a sustainable B2B business collecting only public data. Real revenue breakdown and legal framework.

posts.title: From 0 to 430,000 RUB/Month. SaaS in Russia, Slowly
posts.excerpt: Month-by-month account of growing a SaaS product without venture capital. Including the failures, the plateaus, and what actually moved the needle.

posts.title: How clickfraud.ru Won an 8M Ruble State Grant
posts.excerpt: We applied to the Foundation for Innovation Assistance and won. How we evaluated the market, structured the application, and defended the project before experts.

items.name: clickfraud.ru
items.desc: Click fraud protection for Russian advertisers. Machine learning + behavioral analysis.

items.name: xmldatafeed.com
items.desc: Web scraping and price monitoring at scale. 20M+ RUB/year revenue.

items.desc: Simple free CRM for small businesses. No enterprise complexity required.

quote.text: No success theater. No marketing fluff. Real revenue, real mistakes, real outcomes.

footer.copy: © 2025 Maksim Kulgin. No hype. Real practice.
